Outlet Profile: READERSHIP/AUDIENCE PROFILE General  EDITORIAL PROFILE National Native News started production more than a decade ago to provide Native and non-Native public radio listeners with a regular, timely and balanced source of news about Native issues. National Native News covers the social, economic and cultural issues that affect every community, and helps radio listeners understand the interconnectedness between Native people and their non-Native neighbors.  The program is distributed nationally by Public Radio International, (PRI).
